description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof clad in reddish-brown shingles, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The exterior walls are dark, likely wood or painted siding, with lighter trim accentuating the windows and eaves. The front facade includes a prominent overhanging gable with decorative wooden supports and two symmetrically placed windows beneath. The side elevations reveal a series of rectangular windows, with one side showing three evenly spaced windows and the other side two windows and a small covered entry. The structure sits on a raised, dark-colored base, possibly representing a foundation or porch area. The overall design suggests a cozy, single-family dwelling with classic architectural elements.
description: A dark-sided house with a steep reddish-brown gable roof, decorative front gable, and symmetrical window arrangements, set on a raised base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the prominent gable roof, decorative wooden supports, and two front windows beneath the overhang.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the long roof slope and two windows, one of which is partially covered by a small overhang.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back gable, a single door, and a small window, with minimal decorative elements.
description_view_3: The right side view features three evenly spaced rectangular windows and the extended roofline.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a small overhang, decorative wooden supports, and steps leading up to the door
